_genesis: 2026-06-04 GB structured-suggestion feed per THREAD hopper-feed-iron-clad-proposal-request. Schema: ts, source_cyl, source_entry_hash, lane (book:Sx | tooling | private-learning | coordination), series_ref (tight), one_line_intent (tight one-liner), lgp_hint (1-3 tags), priority (high|normal|low), ref (hmc: or thread:). GB sole append writer. Tiger/Hopper consumer. KM ratifies via packet. Starts honest MOCK until one real cycle. See GB proposal in THREAD [8] for full fields + rationale. LGP north-star.

one_line_intent: User voice test feedback: after Accept, card often stays in Diffs Ready (status not moving); need in-card visibility of agent activity/thread (what agents are doing behind the scenes, terminal-like) so user can track without guessing or leaving context.
User Round 4 test: after accept on rich FEC-style card, card stays in Diffs Ready (status not moving to Sealed); can't tell if agents working; wants in-card visibility of agent activity/thread.
